mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, (SELECT LISTAGG(p.name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.name) FROM permission_mapping pm JOIN permission p ON pm.perm_id = p.id WHERE pm.role_id = r.id ) AS perNames FROM roles r ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('roles') FROM dual
INSERT INTO roles ( id, name, is_assignee) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{isAssignee})
